title: castilleja affinis subsp. litoralis
intro: Castilleja affinis subsp. litoralis, also known as Seaside Indian Paintbrush, is a perennial plant species in the Orobanchaceae family that obtains its nutrients by parasitizing the roots of surrounding plants. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of Seaside Indian Paintbrush include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an expectorant to ease coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
